propensity_dimensions.label: Gamification Engagement
propensity_dimensions.description: Reward accumulation and habit streak — log-normalized to reduce zero-inflation skew

propensity_dimensions.label: AI Tutor Usage
propensity_dimensions.description: Active AI-guided practice: smoothed tutor usage signal + exercise depth

propensity_dimensions.label: Leaderboard & Competition
propensity_dimensions.description: Competitive engagement: smoothed leaderboard signal using norm_days (not sessions, no leakage)

D0.default: Welcome to SpeakX! Start your journey to speaking confidence today.
D0.gamification: Welcome! Earn your first points & start a streak today. Let's go!
D0.ai_tutor: Welcome! Your AI Tutor is ready for your first conversation. Speak freely!
D0.leaderboard: Welcome! See how you rank. Start practicing to climb the leaderboard!
D0.social: Welcome! Join our community of learners. Your voice matters here!

D1.default: Great start! Keep practicing to build your speaking confidence.
D1.gamification: Day 1 complete! Keep your streak alive & earn more coins. Practice now!
D1.ai_tutor: Ready for your next AI Tutor chat? Practice speaking without fear!
D1.leaderboard: Check your rank! A new day means new chances to climb the leaderboard.
D1.social: Connect with others! Share your progress & get inspired by fellow learners.

D2.default: Consistency is key! A little practice each day goes a long way.
D2.gamification: 2-day streak! Don't lose it now. Practice to keep your progress going!
D2.ai_tutor: Your AI Tutor is always here. Get instant feedback & speak better!
D2.leaderboard: Moving up? See your progress on the leaderboard. Keep practicing!
D2.social: Inspire others! Your practice helps build our vibrant learning community.

D3.default: Feeling more confident? Keep up the great work with SpeakX!
D3.gamification: 3-day streak! You're building a habit. Practice to earn a bonus!
D3.ai_tutor: Unlock new topics with your AI Tutor. Expand your vocabulary today!
D3.leaderboard: Top 100? Check your rank & challenge yourself to improve!
D3.social: Share your wins! Celebrate your speaking progress with friends.

D4.default: Don't stop now! Your speaking goals are within reach.
D4.gamification: 4-day streak! Amazing! Keep going for bigger rewards. Practice now!
D4.ai_tutor: Personalized feedback from your AI Tutor helps you speak fluently.
D4.leaderboard: The competition is heating up! Practice to stay ahead on the leaderboard.
D4.social: Learning is better together. Invite a friend to join SpeakX!

D5.default: Almost a week! How's your speaking confidence growing?
D5.gamification: 5-day streak! You're a habit master! Keep earning those coins.
D5.ai_tutor: Your AI Tutor adapts to you. Try a new conversation topic today!
D5.leaderboard: New week, new goals! Can you reach the top 50? Check the leaderboard.
D5.social: Join a group chat! Discuss challenges & celebrate successes with peers.

D6.default: One more day to a full week of progress! You're doing great.
D6.gamification: 6-day streak! Almost a week! Don't break it now. Practice & win!
D6.ai_tutor: Practice makes perfect. Your AI Tutor is ready for your next session.
D6.leaderboard: Weekend challenge! Boost your rank before the week ends. Practice now!
D6.social: Share your favorite lesson! Help others discover new ways to learn.

D7.default: Congratulations on a week of practice! Ready for more?
D7.gamification: 7-day streak! You've earned a special reward! Claim it & keep going!
D7.ai_tutor: A full week with your AI Tutor! See how much your speaking improved.
D7.leaderboard: Weekly results are in! How did you do? Aim higher next week!
D7.social: You've completed a week! Share your journey & inspire new learners.

D8.default: Keep up the great work! Your premium journey to fluency continues.
D8.at_risk: We miss you! Your speaking goals are important. Let's get back on track.
D8.gamification: Your streak is strong! Keep earning premium bonuses. Practice today!
D8.ai_tutor: Dive deeper with your AI Tutor. Advanced topics await your practice!
D8.leaderboard: Premium perks! Get exclusive insights on your leaderboard progress.
D8.social: Connect with premium members! Share advanced tips & learning strategies.

D10.default: Two weeks in! How are your speaking skills evolving?
D10.gamification: 10-day streak! You're a pro! Keep that momentum going for rewards.
D10.ai_tutor: Master new accents with your AI Tutor. Try a regional dialect today!
D10.leaderboard: Climbing the ranks? Your consistent practice shows on the leaderboard!
D10.social: Join our premium speaking club! Practice with peers & get feedback.

D15.default: Halfway through the month! Your dedication is truly paying off.
D15.gamification: 15-day streak! Incredible! Unlock special achievements today.
D15.ai_tutor: Advanced conversations with your AI Tutor. Discuss complex topics!
D15.leaderboard: Mid-month push! Can you reach the top 10? Check your rank now!
D15.social: Host a virtual study session! Practice speaking with other premium users.

D20.default: You're building a powerful habit. Keep speaking with confidence!
D20.gamification: 20-day streak! Almost a month! Don't break your amazing progress.
D20.ai_tutor: Refine your fluency with targeted AI Tutor exercises. Speak like a native!
D20.leaderboard: End-of-month sprint! Boost your score & secure your top position!
D20.social: Share your success story! Inspire others in our premium community.

D25.default: Just a few days left this month! Maximize your speaking practice.
D25.gamification: 25-day streak! You're a legend! Big rewards are coming your way.
D25.ai_tutor: Your AI Tutor is your secret weapon. Practice daily for peak performance.
D25.leaderboard: Final push! The top spots are within reach. Practice to win!
D25.social: Give feedback to peers! Help others improve their speaking skills.

D30.default: Congratulations on a month of consistent practice! What's next?
D30.gamification: 30-day streak! You've mastered the habit! Claim your ultimate reward!
D30.ai_tutor: A month with your AI Tutor! Reflect on your incredible speaking progress.
D30.leaderboard: Monthly leaderboard results! Celebrate your achievements & set new goals.
D30.social: Celebrate your month of progress! Share your journey with the community.

D30.default: We miss you! Your speaking journey doesn't have to end here.
D30.gamification: Your streak is waiting! Rejoin to reactivate your progress & rewards.
D30.ai_tutor: Your AI Tutor misses you! Come back for a free practice session.
D30.leaderboard: Your spot on the leaderboard is waiting. Rejoin to compete again!
D30.social: Your friends are still learning! Rejoin to connect & practice together.

D45.default: Don't let speech anxiety win. SpeakX can help you regain confidence.
D45.gamification: Special offer! Rejoin now & we'll restore your last streak progress.
D45.ai_tutor: Unlock a personalized AI Tutor path designed just for your return.
D45.leaderboard: A fresh start! Rejoin & climb the leaderboard from scratch.
D45.social: New community challenges await! Rejoin to participate & make friends.

D60.default: Still thinking about improving your English? We're here for you.
D60.gamification: Exclusive bonus coins if you reactivate your account today!
D60.ai_tutor: Experience our improved AI Tutor. It's even better than before!
D60.leaderboard: New season, new leaderboard! Rejoin to claim your spot.
D60.social: Our community has grown! Rejoin to meet new learners & practice.

D90.default: It's never too late to restart your speaking journey. We're ready!
D90.gamification: Your progress matters. Rejoin & we'll give you a head start on streaks!
D90.ai_tutor: Your AI Tutor is waiting to help you speak confidently again.
D90.leaderboard: Ready for a comeback? Rejoin & show everyone what you've learned!
D90.social: Reconnect with your learning buddies! Rejoin SpeakX today.

D30.default: We've missed you! Ready to get back to building speaking confidence?
D30.gamification: Your streak is paused, not lost! Come back to reactivate your progress.
D30.ai_tutor: Your AI Tutor is ready when you are. Practice speaking without pressure.
D30.leaderboard: Your spot on the leaderboard is waiting. Come back & compete!
D30.social: Your friends are still learning! Rejoin to connect & practice together.

D45.default: Don't let your progress fade. A little practice goes a long way!
D45.gamification: Special offer! Come back now & we'll give you a streak boost!
D45.ai_tutor: Unlock a personalized AI Tutor path designed just for your return.
D45.leaderboard: A fresh start! Come back & climb the leaderboard from scratch.
D45.social: New community challenges await! Come back to participate & make friends.

D60.default: Still thinking about improving your English? We're here for you.
D60.gamification: Exclusive bonus coins if you return to practice today!
D60.ai_tutor: Experience our improved AI Tutor. It's even better than before!
D60.leaderboard: New season, new leaderboard! Come back to claim your spot.
D60.social: Our community has grown! Come back to meet new learners & practice.

D90.default: It's never too late to restart your speaking journey. We're ready!
D90.gamification: Your progress matters. Come back & we'll give you a head start on streaks!
D90.ai_tutor: Your AI Tutor is waiting to help you speak confidently again.
D90.leaderboard: Ready for a comeback? Come back & show everyone what you've learned!
D90.social: Reconnect with your learning buddies! Return to SpeakX today.

default.primary_goal: Encourage initial engagement and highlight core value proposition.
default.sub_goal: Complete first lesson or AI Tutor session.
default.messaging_focus: Value, ease of use, confidence building

gamification.primary_goal: Motivate users to start and maintain their first daily streak.
gamification.sub_goal: Achieve a 3-day streak and earn first coins.

ai_tutor.primary_goal: Drive users to experience the AI Tutor's real-time feedback.
ai_tutor.sub_goal: Complete at least one AI Tutor conversation.
ai_tutor.messaging_focus: Personalized practice, immediate feedback, speaking confidence

leaderboard.primary_goal: Introduce users to the social competition aspect and encourage participation.
leaderboard.sub_goal: View the leaderboard and complete enough exercises to get ranked.

social.primary_goal: Foster a sense of community and shared learning experience.
social.sub_goal: Explore community features or invite a friend.

default.primary_goal: Sustain consistent engagement and highlight premium feature benefits.
default.sub_goal: Maintain weekly active sessions and explore advanced lessons.
default.messaging_focus: Continued progress, premium value, skill mastery

at_risk.primary_goal: Re-engage users showing signs of reduced activity to prevent churn.
at_risk.sub_goal: Complete at least one session or AI Tutor conversation.
at_risk.messaging_focus: Empathy, value reminder, ease of return

gamification.primary_goal: Encourage continued streak maintenance and engagement with gamified elements.
gamification.sub_goal: Achieve a 30-day streak and utilize earned coins.

ai_tutor.primary_goal: Promote deeper engagement with the AI Tutor for advanced skill refinement.
ai_tutor.sub_goal: Complete multiple advanced AI Tutor sessions weekly.

leaderboard.primary_goal: Motivate users to actively compete and improve their standing.
leaderboard.sub_goal: Consistently check leaderboard and strive for higher ranks.

social.primary_goal: Encourage participation in premium community features and interactions.
social.sub_goal: Engage in group discussions or invite other premium users.

default.primary_goal: Initiate re-engagement and remind users of the core value proposition.
default.sub_goal: Click on a re-engagement notification and revisit the app.

gamification.primary_goal: Leverage past progress and potential loss to encourage reactivation.
gamification.sub_goal: Reactivate account to restore streak or claim a bonus.

ai_tutor.primary_goal: Highlight the unique benefit of the AI Tutor to entice return.
ai_tutor.sub_goal: Complete a free or discounted AI Tutor session.
ai_tutor.messaging_focus: Personalized help, confidence boost, ease of practice

leaderboard.primary_goal: Reignite competitive spirit and desire for social recognition.
leaderboard.sub_goal: Reactivate account to check new leaderboard season or rank.

social.primary_goal: Remind users of the community aspect and shared learning journey.
social.sub_goal: Reactivate account to reconnect with friends or join new groups.

default.primary_goal: Prompt users to return to regular practice and re-establish habit.
default.sub_goal: Open the app and complete at least one exercise.
default.messaging_focus: Gentle reminder, ease of return, benefit recall

gamification.primary_goal: Motivate users to resume their streaks and continue earning rewards.
gamification.sub_goal: Resume daily streak and complete an exercise to earn coins.

ai_tutor.primary_goal: Encourage users to re-engage with the AI Tutor for speaking practice.
ai_tutor.sub_goal: Complete an AI Tutor session to refresh speaking skills.

leaderboard.primary_goal: Re-engage users by reminding them of their competitive standing.
leaderboard.sub_goal: View the leaderboard and complete exercises to improve rank.

social.primary_goal: Encourage users to reconnect with the community and shared learning.
social.sub_goal: Check community updates or invite a friend to practice.
